About Me

I'm a second-year B.Tech Computer Science student at Lovely Professional University with a current CGPA of 8.08, driven by a deep passion for data analytics and software development.

My journey began with mastering core programming in C++, Python, and Java, which led me to building real-world dashboards and data visualization projects using industry tools like Power BI, Excel, and Python's data ecosystem.

I believe data is more than numbers — it's a story waiting to be told. My goal is to bridge the gap between raw datasets and actionable decisions that create real-world impact.

Projects
01
Air Quality Visualization of India
Apr '25
Python Pandas Seaborn Matplotlib GeoPandas Jupyter

Leveraging Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), data cleaning, and impactful visualizations, I analysed real-world air quality data to uncover key environmental insights across India.

  • Identified the 3 most concentrated pollutants in India's air: PM10 (30.6%), PM2.5 (25.9%), and OZONE (15.7%) — pinpointing priority areas for environmental action.
  • Implemented advanced visualization techniques with Matplotlib, Seaborn, and map integrations to enhance data readability and impact.
◆ GitHub Repo
02
Commodity Price Analysis — Indian Markets
Apr '25
Microsoft Excel Pivot Tables Pivot Charts EDA

Built an interactive Excel dashboard to analyze commodity price trends across Indian markets using real-world government data with dynamic slicers and pivot visualizations.

  • Performed data cleaning including column standardization and created a derived metric — Price Spread (Max–Min) — for volatility analysis.
  • Identified top commodities and state-wise price variations; highest price spread: Apple in Azadpur at ~₹15,125, enabling market-level trend analysis.
◆ GitHub Repo
03
Exam Score Prediction Dashboard
Dec '25
Power BI Power Query KPI Cards EDA

Built a 3-page interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing 20,000+ student records across demographics, academic behavior, and lifestyle factors to uncover performance patterns.

  • Developed interactive visualizations (KPI cards, scatter plots, bar & donut charts) with slicers for dynamic analysis using Power Query transformations.
  • Identified key insights including impact of sleep quality and internet access on exam scores, and self-study as the most preferred learning method.
◆ GitHub Repo
